description: Migrate local Fitbit exported CSV data into a connected Supabase instance.

userStories.title: Set up Supabase script environment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to initialize a project to run migration scripts against Supabase.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize script project to parse CSVs and read DB connection string from .env
Install Supabase client or database drivers
Write base connection script and verify connection

userStories.title: Create Heart Rate Alerts schema
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want to create a database table matching the Heart Rate Alerts CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 'heart_rate_alerts' table with columns: id, start_timestamp, end_timestamp, type, threshold, value
Generate and run migration successfully against the connected DB

userStories.title: Ingest Heart Rate Alerts data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to script the file read and database insert for Heart Rate Alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: Script parses 'Heart Rate/Heart Rate Notifications Alerts.csv'
Rows are structured and inserted correctly ignoring duplicate primary keys

userStories.title: Create Sleep Profiles schema
userStories.description: As a data engineer, I want a table representing the Sleep Profile export.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 'sleep_profiles' table with required dates, floats, and text columns as seen in the CSV

userStories.title: Ingest Sleep Profile data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to script the parse and load stage for Sleep Profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Numerical floats and strings are correctly mapped to DB columns and inserted
